body: type Prettify<T> = { [K in keyof T]: T[K] } & {};
Prettify — inspect a type's flattened sh.description: Self-contained: declares Prettify inline, then a scratch line to hover (K) or read via twoslash ^?. Works in any project — delete all three lines when done.

body: ? T extends infer O ? { [K in keyof O]: PrettifyDeep<O[K]> } : never
PrettifyDeep — recursively expand a nest.description: Self-contained deep expansion for nested object types. Hover _Pretty (K) or read the twoslash ^?. Delete when done.
